description: From the manufacturer Fun in the pool or at the sea Race Intex Goggles From swimming class to afternoon in the pool, the Race Goggles are the perfect choice for your kids to swim safely. Made from hypoallergenic latex free material, they feature anti-fog lenses with UV protection against the sun's rays. Suitable for children aged 8 years and upThe item is available in assorted models, only 1 product will be sent at the time of order according to stock availability. Variation cannot be chosen
